title: jonnations/Sulawesi_Community_Repo: Sulawesi Community Repo v1.2
author: Jonathan A. Nations
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
v1.2 of repo for The roles of isolation and interspecific interaction in generating the functional diversity of an insular mammal radiation.
Updates from v1.1 include changing the locomotor data analysis from ordinal to categorical.
steps_raw:
